item.title: 伊拉克暂停经关键输油管道向土耳其港口输送原油
item.description: 据知情人士透露，伊拉克已暂停从其半自治的库尔德斯坦地区向土耳其杰伊汉港出口石油。【原文：Iraq has halted oil exports from its semi-autonomous Kurdistan region to the port of Ceyhan in Turkey, according to people with direct knowledge of the situation.】

item.title: 捷克央行预测经济将强劲增长，扩张幅度超出预期
item.description: 捷克央行表示，继去年超预期的强劲增长之后，该国经济增长势头正日益强劲。【原文：Economic growth in the Czech Republic is becoming more robust after a stronger-than-expected expansion last year, according to the central bank.】

item.title: 彭博投资大会最新动态
item.description: 2026年3月3日周二，美国纽约彭博投资活动开始前，舞台上展示的标识牌。摄影师：迈克尔·纳格尔【原文：Signage displayed on stage ahead of the Bloomberg Invest event in New York, US, on Tuesday, March 3, 2026. Photographer: Michael Nagle】

item.title: 印度对中东战争表示关切，莫迪面临质询
item.description: 印度表示，对中东地区冲突扩大及其对该地区印度公民的影响表示关切，但未提及伊朗领导人死亡事件，也未谴责美以联合袭击，尽管遭到反对派人士的批评。【原文：India said it is concerned about the widening conflict in the Middle East and the impact on its citizens in the region, but avoided mentioning the death of Iran’s leader or condemning the US-Israeli joint attack despite criticism from opposition figures.】

item.title: 罗·卡纳支持财富税引发硅谷初选挑战
item.description: 众议员罗·卡纳因支持加州财富税而遭到亿万富翁们的强烈反对。如今，一位科技企业家正试图将这份愤怒转化为挑战卡纳在硅谷选区的初选攻势。【原文：Representative Ro Khanna is facing backlash from billionaires for supporting a California wealth tax. Now a tech entrepreneur wants to turn that anger into a June primary challenge for Khanna’s Silicon Valley seat.】

item.title: 里夫斯扩大英国财政缓冲，因伊朗战争威胁经济增长
item.description: 财政大臣瑞秋·里夫斯在公布最新预测时表示，借贷规模将有所降低，但2026年的经济增长将趋于疲软，她借此机会增强了财政缓冲能力。【原文：Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves boosted her fiscal buffer as she unveiled new forecasts that projected lower borrowing but weaker 2026 growth.】

item.title: 美国盘前活跃股：百思买、埃克森美孚、MongoDB、Surgery Partners
item.description: 截至纽约时间上午7:35，标普500指数期货下跌1.4%，因伊朗战争进入第四日，加剧了市场对能源市场长期中断及通胀飙升的担忧。【原文：S&P 500 Index futures are down 1.4% as of 7:35 a.m. in New York as the war in Iran enters its fourth day, heightening fears of a lengthy disruption to energy markets and a surge in inflation.】

item.title: 伊朗战争扰乱供应，全球柴油价格飙升
item.description: 受中东冲突威胁全球供应影响，柴油相对于原油的溢价飙升至2023年夏季以来的最高水平。【原文：Diesel’s premium to crude oil surged to its highest since the summer of 2023, as the conflict in the Middle East threatens global supplies.】

item.title: 美元料将创一年来最大涨幅，通胀担忧加剧
item.description: 随着伊朗局势持续恶化引发通胀担忧，避险需求激增，美元正朝着近一年来最大两日涨幅迈进。【原文：The dollar headed for its biggest two-day rally in almost a year as the deepening war in Iran stoked inflation fears and spurred demand for havens.】

item.title: Medline私募股权投资者启动价值34亿美元的股权出售
item.description: Medline公司股东正出售该公司7500万股股票，借势这家医疗供应商自去年底上市以来股价的上涨行情。【原文：Medline Inc. shareholders are offering 75 million shares in the company, capitalizing on a rally in the medical supplier’s stock since its debut late last year.】

item.title: 帕兰蒂尔股价暴跌38%后重回华尔街买入名单
item.description: 华尔街对Palantir Technologies Inc.的看涨情绪已达到前所未有的高点，该公司国防业务的增长潜力在经历四个月抛售后，重新点燃了市场对该股的热情。【原文：Wall Street is about as bullish about Palantir Technologies Inc. as it’s ever been, as the potential for growth in the company’s defense business brings enthusiasm back to the stock following a four-month selloff.】

item.title: 埃利奥特向Pinterest注资10亿美元用于股票回购
item.description: 激进投资者埃利奥特投资管理公司正向Pinterest公司注资10亿美元，以支持这家社交媒体企业持续多年的股票回购计划。【原文：Activist investor Elliott Investment Management is investing $1 billion in Pinterest Inc. to help fund the social media company’s years-long effort to buy back shares.】

item.title: 爱尔兰提名马赫卢夫连任央行行长
item.description: 爱尔兰提名加布里埃尔·马赫卢夫连任中央银行行长。【原文：Ireland nominated Gabriel Makhlouf for a second term as head of the central bank.】

item.title: 沙特阿美公司探索经红海出口石油以规避霍尔木兹海峡
item.description: 沙特阿美公司正考虑增加向延布港的原油运输量。该港口位于波斯湾外的红海沿岸，由于霍尔木兹海峡持续处于实质性封锁状态，目前已有数十艘油轮在此避风。【原文：Saudi Aramco is exploring the option of delivering more cargoes to Yanbu, a port on the Red Sea that’s situated outside the Persian Gulf, where dozens of ships are hunkered down as the Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed.】

item.title: 集装箱运输业担忧伊朗战争引发的供应短缺与港口拥堵
item.description: 今年本应是运力充裕、运费走低的年份。【原文：This was supposed to be the year of ample capacity and lower shipping rates.】

item.title: 卡塔尔液化天然气设施突停引发全球天然气贸易震荡
item.description: 交易商正为中东冲突可能引发的供应中断和价格上涨做准备。【原文：Traders are bracing for supply disruptions and higher prices due to conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: 巴西经济表现低于预期，降息行动在即
item.description: 2025年末，巴西经济陷入停滞，高昂的借贷成本以及削弱增长的关税措施拖累了经济，为货币宽松政策铺平了道路。【原文：Brazil’s economy sputtered at the end of 2025, dragged down by hefty borrowing costs as well as tariffs that undercut growth and made way for monetary easing.】

item.title: 文件称国际能源署准备稳定受伊朗战争冲击的石油市场
item.description: 国际能源署准备在伊朗冲突后协助稳定全球石油市场，该机构一份被彭博新闻社看到的文件指出，成员国持有超过10亿桶的应急储备。【原文：The International Energy Agency is ready to help stabilize the global oil market in the wake of the Iran conflict, noting that member countries hold over a billion barrels in emergency stockpiles, according to a document prepared by the agency and seen by Bloomberg News.】

item.title: 通胀焦虑笼罩贝森特最青睐的债券市场指标
item.description: 债券收益率飙升，反映出中东战事加剧导致油价暴涨引发的通胀忧虑。【原文：Spiking bond yields show inflation angst from oil price surge as Mideast war deepens.】

item.title: 欧洲人工智能宠儿Mistral正转型为咨询公司？
item.description: 这家初创公司向其最大的欧洲客户派遣人工智能工程师。【原文：The startup embeds AI engineers with its biggest European clients】

item.title: CNBC母公司Versant在分拆后首份财报中超出预期
item.description: 维森特传媒集团于今年1月由康卡斯特公司剥离旗下多家有线电视网络后成立，其公布的全年财务业绩超出分析师预期。【原文：Versant Media Group Inc., created in January when Comcast Corp. spun off many of its cable TV networks, reported full-year financial results that exceeded analysts’ expectations.】

item.title: 心理健康初创企业Grow Therapy估值达30亿美元
item.description: 红杉资本支持的心理健康初创公司Grow Therapy在获得新一轮融资后，估值已达30亿美元。【原文：Sequoia Capital-backed mental health startup Grow Therapy has reached a $3 billion valuation with new funding.】

item.title: 欧洲央行报告警示：稳定币可能对货币政策构成重大风险
item.description: 欧洲央行一份工作文件警告称，稳定币的广泛采用将对欧元区银行和欧洲央行的货币主权构成重大风险，尤其当其与美元等外币挂钩时。【原文：Widespread adoption of stablecoins would pose major risks to euro-area banks and the European Central Bank’s monetary sovereignty, particularly if linked to foreign currencies like the US dollar, an ECB working paper published warned.】

item.title: 南非寻求私营合作伙伴以促进零售债券销售
item.description: 南非正寻求私营部门合作伙伴，以扩大其政府债券在零售市场的销售规模，此举有望拓宽投资者基础并降低借贷成本。【原文：South Africa is seeking private sector partners to ramp up its sale of government bonds to the retail market, potentially widening its investor base and lowering the cost of borrowing.】

item.title: 债券暴跌，伊朗战争加剧通胀风险
item.description:
油价飙升促使交易员削减对宽松货币政策的押注。

【原文：

Oil price surge is prompting traders to scale back bets on easier monetary policy. 

】

item.title: PitchBook称SpaceX 1.75万亿美元估值"合理"
item.description: 据PitchBook分析师称，亿万富翁埃隆·马斯克旗下的SpaceX公司首次公开募股（IPO）估值达到1.75万亿美元是"合理的"。【原文：A $1.75 trillion valuation for billionaire Elon Musk’s SpaceX in an initial public offering would be “justifiable,” according to a PitchBook analyst.】

item.title: 贝莱德称指数基金不足以满足美国退休人员需求
item.description: 贝莱德公司呼吁在401(k)退休金计划中增加主动管理策略并纳入私募资产，认为仅靠指数投资已不足以应对风险，也难以支撑可能长达数十年的退休生活。【原文：BlackRock Inc. called for more active management and the inclusion of private assets in 401(k)s, contending index investing alone is no longer sufficient to manage risk and fund retirements that can now stretch for decades.】

item.title: 交易员开始为本月南非加息布局
item.description: 利率交易员开始将南非本月晚些时候加息的可能性纳入定价考量，因伊朗冲突推高油价，引发通胀担忧再度升温。【原文：Interest-rate traders moved to price in a chance of a South African interest-rate hike later this month as the Iran conflict pushed oil prices higher, reviving concerns about inflation.】

item.title: 埃及镑跌破关键关口 中东冲突持续升级
item.description: 埃及镑兑美元汇率跌破50关口，显示出投资者对中东冲突可能长期化的担忧。【原文：Egypt’s pound weakened past the milestone of 50 per dollar, demonstrating investors’ fears over the prospect of a prolonged conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: MMG利润因铜价上涨和矿山产量强劲增长而翻三番
item.description: MMG有限公司表示，受大宗商品价格上涨和主要矿山产量强劲推动，去年利润增长逾三倍，但仍低于分析师预期。【原文：MMG Ltd. said profit more than tripled last year, buoyed by higher commodity prices and strong output at key mines, though still fell short of analyst estimates.】
